cards.back: The development of computer systems able to perform tasks that typically require human intelligence, such as learning, problem-solving, and decision-making.
A computer system that perceives its environment and acts upon it to achieve a specific goal, often through machine learning or rule-based systems.
A subset of AI that involves training algorithms to make predictions or take actions based on data, without being explicitly programmed.
A type of AI system that uses a set of predefined rules to make decisions and take actions, often based on the input of a user.
The ability of a system to receive and interpret data from its environment, such as images, speech, or text.
